subject: English
chapter: A House Is Not a Home
title: A House Is Not a Home – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story is written by Zan Gaudioso
The author feels lonely in his new high school
His house is destroyed in a fire
His mother saves important documents and photographs
The author's classmates help him by collecting clothes and school supplies
characters: The Narrator – A teenager who struggles with loneliness but later finds support
Mother – A brave woman who saves important memories from the fire
Classmates – Students who show kindness and support
Kind Woman – The person who finds and returns the author’s lost cat
literary_devices: Symbolism – The rebuilding of the house symbolises rebuilding life
Imagery – Descriptions of the fire create vivid pictures
exam_tips: Remember that the author initially feels lonely in high school
Focus on the fire incident and its impact
Explain the meaning of the title
